legacy.name: Stranger

result.text:
What if you’ve already been replaced, and you don’t even know it yet?

You’ve seen it happen, new creators, new voices, new names rising faster than you ever did.

What did they figure out that you didn’t?

   Attention shifts. Trends evolve. New faces will always show up.

Most don’t realize they’ve been left behind until it’s too late.

They keep doing what worked last year, last month, last cycle.

   Meanwhile, the market has moved on.
   The audience has moved on.
   The opportunity has moved on.

By the time you notice, your spot is gone.

In a space that rewards speed, relevance, and adaptability,

Standing still isn’t an option. It’s same as slow exit.

Keep moving. Or get replaced. Simple as that.
